title: Origins Extra Keybinds (Forge)
description: Unofficial port of Origins Extra Keybinds to Minecraft Forge.
body:
Unofficial port of [Origins Extra Keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-extra-keybinds-fabric) to Minecraft Forge.

This mod adds 8 new keybinds to origins, so you can make and use datapacks with more than 2 keybinded powers.

**Usage in a datapack:**
| # | Name | Key |
|---|------|-----|
| 1 | Primary | `key.origins.primary_active` |
| 2 | Secondary | `key.origins.secondary_active` |
| 3 | Ternary | `key.origins.ternary_active` |
| 4 | Quaternary | `key.origins.quaternary_active` |
| 5 | Quinary | `key.origins.quinary_active` |
| 6 | Senary | `key.origins.senary_active` |
| 7 | Septenary | `key.origins.septenary_active` |
| 8 | Octonary | `key.origins.octonary_active` |
| 9 | Nonary | `key.origins.nonary_active` |
| 10 | Denary | `key.origins.denary_active` |
